0.0.1.en:
Initial release
- Control robot vacuums via Dreame Home cloud API
- Cleaning modes: Sweeping, Mopping, Sweeping & Mopping
- Suction level, water volume, and cleaning route control
- CleanGenius intelligent cleaning with auto-start
- Dock features: Auto Empty, Self Clean, Drying
- Consumable monitoring with low alerts
- Battery, cleaned area, cleaning time sensors
- Flow cards for automations
- Configurable polling interval

0.0.2.en:
New capabilities, flow cards, and bug fixes

**New capabilities:**
- Carpet Boost, Sensitivity, and Cleaning mode
- Dock settings: Mop Wash Level, Water Temperature, Auto Empty Frequency, Mop Pressure, Drying Time,

0.0.3.en:
MQTT, room discovery, map widget, and settings page
- Real-time MQTT connection to Dreame cloud for instant state updates
- Automatic room discovery via MQTT and cloud map download
- Dashboard widget: vacuum map with room colors, labels, robot & charger position
- App settings page with map, status, rooms, and consumable overview
- Per-room trigger cards (cleaning started/finished) with autocomplete
- Room cleaning flow cards (single and multi-room)
- Improved map rendering based on Tasshack reference
- Reduced log noise

0.0.4.en:
MQTT-driven updates and adaptive polling
- All property updates now handled via MQTT push (instant instead of 5s delay)
- Adaptive polling: 60s idle / 15s cleaning when MQTT connected, 5s fallback when disconnected
- MQTT health monitoring with automatic fast-poll fallback if connection stalls
- Exponential backoff for MQTT reconnection (10s to 5min)
- ~80% reduction in cloud API calls when MQTT is connected

0.0.5.en:
MQTT stability and crash fixes
- Fix crash caused by unhandled MQTT errors (ECONNRESET, auth timeout, keepalive timeout)
- Use connectAsync for reliable connection establishment
- Automatic token refresh on MQTT auth errors
- Full MQTT restart after 30 minutes when reconnection fails
- HTTP fallback for map/room data when MQTT is unavailable
- Per-device listener management (no more listener leaks on reconnect)
- Room autocomplete shows helpful message when rooms are not yet discovered
- Max 10 reconnect attempts with exponential backoff before falling back to HTTP-only

0.0.6.en:
MQTT improvements and diagnostic logging
- Proactive token refresh prevents MQTT auth failures before they happen
- MQTT topic fix for broader model compatibility
- Use API-returned region for correct MQTT broker routing
- Progressive retry backoff on API requests
- Increased map download timeout for large maps
- Optional diagnostic logging via Sentry (disabled by default, enable in app settings)
- Reduced log noise in production

0.0.7.en: added optional debug setting so the developer can collect MQTT errors to debug

0.0.9.en:
Manual room ID flow cards and improved diagnostics
- New flow cards to clean rooms by ID as alternative to autocomplete (single room, multi-room, triggers, condition)
- Useful when room auto-discovery has not completed yet
- Improved map/room discovery diagnostic logging for troubleshooting
- Sentry extras now correctly included in diagnostic events
- Automatic HTTP fallback when MQTT map response times out
- Removed Dutch (NL) translations to reduce translation burden and improve dev speed
- Region selector in pairing screen (select your Dreame Home region + login in one step)
- Sentry diagnostic logging for pairing and device discovery errors

0.0.12.en: additional debug logs for fixing compatibility with L20

0.0.13.en: map view decoding with encryption key for L20 ultra

0.0.15.en: fix proper decryption of maps for some models (incl L20 ultra)

0.0.19.en:
Live tracking, current room status, dock status fixes
- Live robot position on map widget and settings page during cleaning
- Current room capability shows which room the robot is in (live during cleaning, dock room when charging)
- Fixed water tank, dirty water tank, dust bag status using correct SIID/PIID mapping
- Dock-specific properties (SIID 27) properly probed and auto-removed when unsupported
- Fixed current room detection using stored full map instead of sparse P-frame pixels
- Cached rism pixel data for fast room lookups on every P-frame (~3s)
- Localized room type names (NL/DE/FR) for room discovery

0.0.20.en:
Consumables widget and robot position fix
- New Vacuum Consumables dashboard widget with color-coded health bars
- Fixed robot position (blue dot) snapping to dock when not cleaning instead of showing incorrect position
- Added missing robot position handler for map widget live tracking
- Community forum link added to App Store listing

0.0.32.en:
Bug fixes and new features

**Bug fixes:**
- Fixed cleaning mode swap still occurring on some devices (L20 Ultra). Added runtime mop pad lifting detection from grouped mode values.
- Fixed zone cleaning finished trigger never firing (was checking wrong property value).
- Zone and waypoint triggers now fire immediately when cleaning completes, before the robot returns to dock.

**New features:**
- Waypoint navigation: click on the map in app settings to place waypoints, then navigate the robot to them via flow cards. Uses tiny zone approach (sweeping + quiet) to avoid camera mode.
- Waypoint reached trigger card with optional waypoint filter.
- Pause vacuum and Stop vacuum flow action cards.
- Zone cleaning and waypoint cards now have an 'After cleaning' option: Return to dock (default) or Stop in place.

**Improvements:**
- Diagnostic logging now visible with homey app run --remote.
- Probe version bumped to force re-detection of device capabilities on upgrade.

0.0.30.en:
Critical bug fix: cleaning modes, zone cleaning, shortcuts, and more

**Bug fixes:**
- Fixed sweeping/mopping modes being swapped on combo-dock robots (L20 Ultra, X40 Ultra, and similar). Sweeping now correctly vacuums, Sweeping & Mopping correctly does both.
- Auto-detection of mop pad lifting capability for correct mode mapping per device
- Cleaning finished trigger now fires when robot reaches the dock (not mid-return), so Then-cards in flows work reliably

**New features:**
- Zone cleaning: draw custom zones on the map in app settings, clean them via flow cards
- Zone cleaning finished trigger with optional zone name filter
- Simple room cleaning cards (use current device settings without specifying suction/water)
- Dreame shortcuts: run shortcuts configured in the Dreame Home app via flow cards
- Widget color schemes: Dreame Light/Dark, Mijia Light/Dark, Grayscale
- Configurable map label size in widget settings (S/M/L/XXL)
- Redesigned settings page with native Homey styling

**Under the hood:**
- Replaced @sentry/node (43MB) with lightweight SentryLite (3KB) — 80% app size reduction
- Replaced node-fetch with native Node 18 fetch
- Grouped mode mask fix aligned with Tasshack reference implementation

**Removed (for now):**
- Multi-floor support has been removed to improve stability and reduce complexity. It was the source of most regressions in test versions 0.0.24-0.0.29. We plan to re-implement it properly in a future release.
- Map rotation has been removed for the same reason.
